title: TerraVanilla Expanded
description: Modpack includes terraria and advanced vanila features
body:
TerraVanilla Expanded is a modpack that blends the charm of classic Vanilla Minecraft with the content of Terraria.
  Explore new biomes, battle unique bosses, craft powerful gear, and enjoy a richer progression — all while keeping the familiar vanilla feel.
 Features:
 Expanded vanilla gameplay and world generation
 Balanced progression between vanilla and modded content 
 Perfect for survival or adventure-style playthroughs
